headline: Lightmatter Joins NVIDIA NVLink Fusion and Powers Next-Generation AI Infrastructure with Photonic Interconnects

headline: Ayar Labs Joins NVIDIA NVLink™ Fusion Ecosystem to Bring Co-Packaged Optics to Rack-Scale AI Infrastructure

This allows hyperscalers and system innovators to build optically-connected AI infrastructure around NVIDIA’s NVLink Fusion platform and partner ecosystem.
